The '''Granicus system''' included the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Granicus]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Granicus system was mentioned in the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] backstory devised by [[George Lucas]] in [[1977]] for [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], but was not mentioned in any licensed products, making its status as yet non canonical.
